title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0113 Chasefield House, 888 Fishponds Road, Bristol BS16 3XB
body: "Type of application:  Application for Planning Permission and for relevant demolition of an unlisted building in a conservation area  Applicant name:  HAS 7 Limited  Site address:  Chasefield House, 888 Fishponds Road, Bristol BS16 3XB  Description of proposed development:  Conversion of existing care home (Use Class C2) to provide two separate, large Sui Generis HMO’s (1no. 9 bedroom and 1no. 10 bedroom) together with associated external alterations to the building  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   Written Representations  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 29 July 2025   Date by when representations must be made 4 September 2025   Hearing date and venue NA   Target Decision 8 October 2025   Decision date 8 October 2025     Decision    S62A/2025/0113 Decision Notice and Statement of Reasons   (PDF, 259 KB, 8 pages)   Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 4 September 2025.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, 3rd Floor, Temple Quay House, 2 The Square, Temple Quay, Bristol, BS1 6PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0113 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     1000B Existing Site Plan  (PDF, 228 KB, 1 page)  1001A Existing Block Plan  (PDF, 166 KB, 1 page)  1100 Existing Basement Plan  (PDF, 142 KB, 1 page)  1101 Existing GF Plan  (PDF, 146 KB, 1 page)  1102 Existing FF Plan  (PDF, 153 KB, 1 page)  1103 Existing Roof Plan  (PDF, 147 KB, 1 page)  1200A Existing Front North Elev  (PDF, 114 KB, 1 page)  1201 Existing Rear South Elev  (PDF, 136 KB, 1 page)  1202 Existing East Elev  (PDF, 96.6 KB, 1 page)  1203 Existing West Elev  (PDF, 113 KB, 1 page)...
